name: Polybrene Stock (10 mg/mL)

notes.en: Filter-sterilize through 0.22 µm after dissolving. Aliquot 100-500 µL and freeze. Working concentration typically 4-8 µg/mL. Polybrene enhances viral adsorption by neutralizing charge. Some cells (e.g. primary T cells) are sensitive — reduce concentration or use protamine sulfate instead.
notes.zh: 溶解后 0.22 µm 过滤除菌。分装为 100-500 µL 小份冻存。使用浓度通常为 4-8 µg/mL。Polybrene 通过中和电荷增强病毒吸附。某些细胞（如原代 T 细胞）对 Polybrene 敏感，需降低浓度或改用 protamine sulfate。

ref: Davis et al. (2004) Curr Protoc Mol Biol 9.9
